backend.label: Backend
backend.desc: Which on-screen keyboard to control (auto detects at startup)

hideWhenUnavailable.label: Hide when unavailable
hideWhenUnavailable.desc: Hide the widget entirely when the keyboard is not available

disableHoverIcon.label: Disable hover icon
disableHoverIcon.desc: Always show the current state icon instead of a hover icon. Note: hover icons only appear when the bar is at the top or bottom.

wvkbdBin.label: wvkbd binary
wvkbdBin.desc: Binary name or path (e.g. wvkbd-mobintl, wvkbd-comp, wvkbd-abc)
